Fundamentals.0-1: Cannot explain basic concepts, incorrect definitions
Fundamentals.2: Surface-level understanding, memorized definitions without reasoning
Fundamentals.3: Solid understanding, can explain with examples
Fundamentals.4: Strong fundamentals, explains tradeoffs and nuances
Fundamentals.5: Expert-level, deep understanding, can teach concepts

Coding.0-1: Cannot solve basic problems, needs heavy guidance
Coding.2: Solves with significant help, basic approach only
Coding.4: Strong problem solving, optimal solutions, good debugging
Coding.5: Exceptional, multiple approaches, elegant code, anticipates edge cases

Architecture.0-1: No system design understanding, cannot decompose problems
Architecture.2: Basic understanding, buzzword usage without depth
Architecture.3: Solid understanding, can design services with prompting
Architecture.4: Strong architecture skills, evaluates tradeoffs independently
Architecture.5: Expert-level architecture, considers org impact, capacity planning

Ownership.2: Completes assigned work well, minimal proactivity
Ownership.5: Org-level impact, strategic thinking, influences standards

Communication.4: Strong communication, teaches effectively, uses analogies
Communication.5: Exceptional communication, influences thinking, anticipates confusion

Practical.2: Limited exposure, worked on features without system context
Practical.3: Solid practical experience, understands production environment
Practical.4: Strong practical depth, production ownership, incident handling
Practical.5: Expert-level practical experience, cross-system production ownership

Learning.0-1: Resistant to learning, bluffs through gaps
Learning.4: Active learner, explores beyond requirements, stays current
Learning.5: Exceptional learning ability, thought leader, teaches industry

decision_bands.borderline: weighted_score >= threshold - 0.3 AND has compensating strengths (2+ dimensions >= 4.5)
decision_bands.reject: weighted_score < threshold - 0.3 OR critical red flag

red_flags.Fundamentals < 2.0: Applies to intermediate, senior, lead roles
red_flags.Ownership < 2.0: Applies to senior and lead roles
